flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Johnson University fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (58.5% → 42.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Johnson University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Johnson University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (657 → 743).
